overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking along abandoned railroad tracks through a dark forest at night. The scene transitions from an open area with a distant snow-capped mountain visible to an enclosed dense woodland corridor with thick canopy cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railway through open forest with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railroad tracks with a rifle and baseball bat strapped to back, heading toward the distant mountain

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak visible in the distance beyond the forest
tall metal electricity pylon standing on the hillside
abandoned railway tracks with wooden sleepers and gravel bed
scattered evergreen trees lining both sides of the tracks
tall grass and reddish wildflowers growing alongside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along abandoned railroad tracks through an open forest area at night. A snow-capped mountain dominates the distant horizon while a power transmission tower stands on the right hillside. The tracks stretch forward through scattered pine trees and patches of wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest railway corridor with thickening canopy

events.description: snow-capped mountain fades from view as the path enters denser forest section
ambient light decreases significantly as the tree canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the tracks as the forest becomes denser and the surroundings darker

entered.detail: particularly tall pine tree with thick trunk close to the tracks
rocky slope rising alongside the railway bed

changed.from: scattered trees at left_far and right_far
changed.to: dense forest surrounding the tracks at left_near and right_near

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest as the open mountain vista disappears behind the tree line. The surroundings become more enclosed with dense pine trees pressing closer to the tracks. A large pine tree stands prominently on the left while rocky embankments rise on the right, and the canopy overhead begins to block the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest railway cutting with enclosed canopy and winding path

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding track through the dark enclosed forest, surrounded by dense woodland

entered.detail: large boulders covered in moss beside the track bed
decaying tree trunk lying parallel to the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a deeply enclosed forest corridor where the canopy almost completely blocks the sky. The tracks curve gently through the dark woodland, passing moss-covered rocks and fallen logs. The environment feels isolated and shadowy, with dense vegetation pressing in from all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along abandoned railroad tracks that transition from an open mountain vista into a claustrophobic, dark forest corridor. It begins in an expansive woodland area at night, where a snow-capped mountain dominates the horizon and a power transmission tower stands on a nearby hillside. As the character moves forward, the mountain vista gradually disappears behind the tree line and the surroundings become more enclosed, with dense pine trees and rocky embankments pressing closer to the tracks. The scene then shifts into a deeply isolated woodland corridor where the overhead canopy almost completely blocks the sky, casting the environment in heavy shadow. Finally, the camera follows the tracks as they curve gently through the darkness, passing moss-covered rocks and fallen logs amidst dense, encroaching vegetation.
